keys.restored: Ikhophi yekhiye ibuyiselwe ✓ Tikhiye tifakwe lapha

keySetup.title: Setha tikhiye temshini wakho
keySetup.description: Lo mshini awunayo ikhiye yakho leyimfihlo. Landa ikhophi lekhuluphekile ngephasiwedi, nobe yakha ipheya lensha (utawukwati kufunda imilayezo lemisha kusukela manje).
keySetup.imported: Ikhiye leyimfihlo ifakiwe kulo mshini. Sewungafunda imilayezo lendzala manje.
keySetup.enterPassword: Faka iphasiwedi yakho ye-akhawunti kuze sikwazi kugcina tikhiye takho ngokuphepha.

encryptionRecovery.title: Phatha Ukufihla
encryptionRecovery.description: Gcina ikhophi, buyisela, vula, noma setha kabusha ikhiye yakho yokufihla.

alert.keyRequiredBody: Lesiphequluli asikwazi okwamanje ukukhishwa ngemakhodi imilayezo yakho efihliwe. Buyisela, vula, noma setha kabusha ikhiye yakho ukuze uqhubeke.
alert.lockedBody: Restore or unlock your encryption key to read encrypted messages on this device.

unlockPasscode.label: Iphasiwedi yokuvula (umshini wamanje)
unlockPasscode.description: Isetshenziselwa ukukhishwa ngemakhodi amakhiye akho ngaphakathi ngaphambi kokuthumela

restoreBackupPassword.label: Iphasiwedi yekhophi
restoreBackupPassword.description: Iphasiwedi oyidale ngesikhathi ugcina ikhiye yakho ku-iPhone

newLocalPasscode.label: Iphasiwedi yendawo entsha
newLocalPasscode.description: Vikela amakhiye lapho ephumule kulesi siphequluli

resetLocalPasscode.label: Iphasiwedi yendawo entsha
resetLocalPasscode.description: Iyadingeka ngaphambi kokusetha kabusha ukuze ikhiye entsha ivikelwe kulo mshini

errors.restoreIncomplete: Ukubuyisela ikhiye akuqediwe noma akulungile kule akhawunti
errors.noBackup: Kute ikhophi efihliwe ekhona yaleli akhawunti
errors.noServerPublicKey: Leli akhawunti alibonisi ikhiye lomkhulu weseva okwamanje
errors.serverBackupMismatch: Ikhophi yeseva ayifani nekhiye yokufihla ye-akhawunti yamanje
errors.resetIncomplete: Ukufihla ukusetha kabusha akuqediwe ngendlela efanele
errors.resetFailed: Could not reset encryption. Please try again.
errors.restoreFailed: Could not restore your encryption key. Check your backup and password.
errors.unlockFailed: Could not unlock your encryption key. Check your passcode and try again.

confirm.reset:
Setha kabusha ukufihla kule akhawunti?

Imilayezo efihliwe endala ingase ingafundeki ngaphandle kokuthi ubuyisele ikhiye yokuqala kamuva.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: Lokhu kwakha ikhiye yokufihla entsha ye-akhawunti yakho. Imilayezo efihliwe endala ingase ingafundeki ngaphandle kokuthi ubuyisele ikhiye yokuqala kamuva.

danger.title: Phatha Ukufihla
danger.body: This creates a new encryption key. Older encrypted messages may become unreadable unless you restore the original key later.

encryptionRecovery.simpleDescription: Use your device passcode or restore a backup to unlock encrypted messages.
encryptionRecovery.restoreDescription: Restore your encrypted chat key from a backup protected by your backup password.

smsConsent.label: I consent to receive SMS notifications and alerts from {{companyName}}. Message frequency may vary. Msg & data rates may apply. Reply <stop>STOP</stop> to unsubscribe at any time. Reply <help>HELP</help> for help.

auth.headline: Imilayezo lekhuluphekile yanoma ngubani, nanoma kuphi
auth.description: Kufihla ngemakhodi kusukela ekupheleni kuya ekupheleni, kuhumusha ku-100+ tilimi, imilayezo lephumayo, kanye nekholi yevidiyo.

feature.encryption: Kufihla ngemakhodi kusukela ekupheleni kuya ekupheleni ngokuzenzakalelayo
feature.privacy: Kubekwa phambili ukuphepha. Imininingwane yakho, ukulawula kwakho.

hero.line1: Imilayezo lekhuluphekile yanoma ngubani, nanoma kuphi — nge
hero.sub: Thola inombolo yefoni lekhuluphekile yamahhala ukuze ukhone ukushayela nokubhala umlayezo emhlabeni wonke nge-Wi-Fi noma idatha. Jabulela ukufihla ngemakhodi kusukela ekupheleni kuya ekupheleni, imilayezo lephumayo, kanye nekholi yevidiyo HD — ngezinsiza ezakhelwe ngaphakathi ezikusiza uhlale uxhumene ngaphesheya kwemingcele.
hero.freeNote: Ushayelo nokubhala umlayezo okuyisisekelo kumahhala. Izinsiza ze-AI eziphambili nezici ze-premium zidinga ukuthuthukiswa.

feat.encryption: Kufihla ngemakhodi kusukela ekupheleni kuya ekupheleni, sihlale sikhona
feat.privacy: Kubekwa phambili ukuphepha. Imininingwane yakho, ukulawula kwakho.

auth.desktopTip: Usekhompyutha? Skhena ngefoni yakho ukuze uthole uhlelo.
auth.scanHelper: Usekhompyutha? Skhena ngefoni yakho ukuze uthole uhlelo.
auth.tip: Iseluleko: Sebenzisa i-akhawunti efanayo kuwebhu naku-mobile. Imilayezo yakho ihlala ihambisana.
auth.scanHint: Skhena ukuze ulande uhlelo noma uvule kusiphequluli sakho.

registration.passwordDescription: Okungenani izinhlamvu ezi-6. Sebenzisa iphasiwedi eqinile nehlukile.
registration.smsConsent: Ngokwakha i-akhawunti, uyavuma ukuthola izaziso ze-SMS ezihlobene nomsebenzi wakho we-Chatforia (njengemilayezo evela kwabanye abasebenzisi). Amazinga emilayezo nedatha angase asebenze. Ungakhetha ukuphuma noma nini ku-Settings.
registration.phoneHelp: Used for verification, security, and SMS features where supported.

peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Stay in touch on the go with Chatforia for iOS and Android.
peoplePage.syncTip: Tip: Your messages stay synced across web and mobile.

profile.title: Iphrofayili yomsebenzisi
profile.noPrivateKey: Kute ikhiye leyimfihlo kulo mshini ukuze ithunyelwe.
profile.setBackupPassword: Setha iphasiwedi ukuze ufihle ikhophi yakho:
profile.importFailed: Uku faka ikhiye kuhlulekile (iphasiwedi engalungile noma ifayela elonakele).
profile.keysRotated: Ipeya yekhiye entsha yakhiwe futhi ikhiye lomkhulu yathunyelwa.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Ikhiye yakho leyimfihlo ayiphumi kulo mshini. Thumela ikhophi efihliwe ngephasiwedi ukuze uyibuyisele kwenye imishini.
profile.themeFreeNotice: Usekwi-Free—sebenzisa izinketho ze-Sun/Moon eziphansi. Thuthukisa ukuze uvule izihloko ezengeziwe.
profile.backupDesc: Gcina ikhiye yakho yokufihla ukuze ubuyisele imilayezo yakho ngokuphepha kwenye imishini.
profile.freePlanCopy: Usekwiplan yamahhala. Thuthukisa ukuze uvule izici ezengeziwe njengamakhophi, izinombolo ezengeziwe, nezilungiselelo zokuphepha eziphambili.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Ayikwazanga ukuvula isango lokukhokha. Sicela uzame futhi.
profile.followHint: Izindaba zabo zizovela ekudeni kwakho kokulandela uma bethumela ngezibukeli Abalandeli (noma Umluntu wonke).
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Dlulisa amakholi nemilayezo engenayo kufoni noma i-imeyili yakho eqinisekisiwe. Amakholi/imilayezo ephumayo angabonisa inombolo yakho ye-Chatforia.
profile.errSmsDest: Khetha okungenani indawo eyodwa (ifoni noma i-imeyili).
profile.errQuietHours: Amahora okuthula kufanele abe phakathi kuka-0 no-23.
profile.ageBandHint: Sigcina kuphela ibhendi yeminyaka (hhayi usuku lwakho lokuzalwa oluqondile). Lokhu kusetshenziselwa ukugcina ukubhangqwa kwe-Random Chat kuhle.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Sebenzisa ukufanisa okusekelwe eminyakeni ku-Random Chat
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Uma ivuliwe, sizama ukubhangqa nawe nabantu abaseminyakeni ehambisanayo.
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Abaseminyakeni eyi-13-17 bahlala bebhangqwa kuphela nabanye abasale kuleyo minyaka. Abadala abakwazi ukubhangqwa nabaseminyakeni eyi-13-17.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Ngokuphepha, ama-akhawunti aseminyakeni eyi-13–17 angabhangqwa kuphela namanye ama-akhawunti aseminyakeni eyi-13–17 ku-Random Chat.
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Uma lokhu kuvuliwe, i-Foria ingasebenzisa izingxoxo zakho ze-Random Chat ezedlule (kuphela nawe) ukuze igcine ingxoxo ihamba. Ungakucisha noma nini.
profile.voicemailAutoDeletePlaceholder: Shiya ingenalutho ukuze igcinwe kuze kube phakade
profile.voicemailForwardEmailPlaceholder: I-imeyili lapho kuthunyelwa khona izaziso ze-voicemail
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Usetshenziswa lapho ukubuyisela kwakho komsindo kungatholakali.
profile.voicemailNote: Ama-voicemail avela ezinombolweni zakho ze-Chatforia azogcinwa ebhokisini lakho le-Voicemail. Ungavumela ukubhala umbhalo nokudlulisa ezinhlelweni ezisekelwayo.
profile.portHint: Ufuna ukugcina inombolo yakho yamanje? Ungayifaka ku-Chatforia Wireless.

aiSettings.title: AI Settings
aiSettings.controlIntro: Control translation, smart replies, and ForiaBot auto-responses.
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Send the last few received messages (sanitized) to AI to suggest quick replies.
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: If on, suggestions returned by AI will have flagged words masked

accessibilitySettings.title: Accessibility & Alerts
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Options to make Chatforia easier to use without relying on sound.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Starts at normal size. Increase if you prefer larger text.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Show banners and title blink so you don’t miss activity.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Brief bright flash when a call rings.
accessibilitySettings.liveCaptionsDesc: Show real-time captions from the other participant’s audio.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Attach a transcript to audio messages you receive.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Visual alerts for messages & calls
Show banners and title blink so you don’t miss activity.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Vibrate on new messages (when supported)
Trigger device vibration with notifications.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Flash screen on incoming call
Brief bright flash when a call rings.

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Store only ciphertext on the server. Disables AI/Translate and moderation previews.
privacySection.strictE2EEEnabled: Strict E2EE enabled. AI/Translate will be disabled.

wireless.description: Phatha iplan yakho yeselula ye-Chatforia, izinombolo, ukudlulisa, nokufaka inombolo.

options.heading: Khetha ukuthi ufuna ukusebenzisa i-Chatforia kanjani

port.heading: Faka inombolo yakho yamanje
port.subheading: Hambisa inombolo yakho yefoni yamanje evela kwinkampani yakho yamanje iye ku-Chatforia. Qinisekisa ukuthi imininingwane ifana ncamashi ne-akhawunti yakho yenkampani ukuze ugweme ukubambezeleka.

status.heading: Isimo sokufaka
status.subheading: Landela isimo sezicelo zakho zokufaka inombolo.

wireless.exhausted: Idatha yakho iphelile. Thenga iphakethe elisha ukuze uqhubeke usebenzisa idatha yeselula.

upgrade.title: Thuthukisa
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Qala ngeplan yethu yamahhala, esekelwe izikhangiso. Yiya ngaphandle kwezikhangiso nge-Plus, noma vula izici ezinamandla ngokugcwele nge-Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Khetha iplan yohlelo, engeza amaphakethe edatha ukuze uzitholele wena, noma wabelane ngedatha nomndeni wakho — konke kusendaweni eyodwa.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Qala ngeplan yethu yamahhala, esekelwe izikhangiso. Yiya ngaphandle kwezikhangiso nge-Plus, noma vula izici ezinamandla ngokugcwele nge-Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Engeza idatha yomhlaba wonke ukuze i-Chatforia iqhubeke isebenza noma ngabe ungekho ku-Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Yakha iphuli yedatha eyabelwe yomndeni wakho futhi uphathe ukusetshenziswa kwawo wonke kusendaweni eyodwa.
upgrade.benefitsLine: Vula izici ezinamandla futhi ususe izikhangiso.

features.chat: Ingxoxo ye-1:1 neqembu yesikhathi sangempela, kanye namakholi nekholi yevidiyo

features.themes: Vula zonke izihloko zemibala ye-premium nokuzenzakalisa kohlelo

features.allPremium: Konke okuku-Premium Ngenyanga — kuhlanganise izihloko zemibala ezengeziwe
features.save25: Gcina cishe ama-30% uma uqhathanisa nokukhokha ngenyanga

marketing.plusDesc: Okuhlangenwe nakho okungabizi kakhulu ngaphandle kwezikhangiso.

mobile.title: i-Chatforia Mobile (amaphakethe edatha e-eSIM)
mobile.subtitle: Engeza idatha yomhlaba wonke ukuze i-Chatforia iqhubeke isebenza ngaphandle kwe-Wi-Fi. Amanani alungiswa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngokwezwe lakho kanye nemali.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Khetha iphakethe ledatha yomhlaba wonke ukuze i-Chatforia iqhubeke isebenza lapho uhamba noma ungekho ku-Wi-Fi.

features.throttle: Isivinini singase sehle ngemva kokusetshenziswa okuphezulu

unlimited.title: Unlimited pack
unlimited.bestFor: Best for heavy use where supported.

disclaimer.devices: Amaphakethe edatha e-eSIM adinga imishini esebenzisa i-eSIM futhi evuliwe. Ukutholakala kuyahlukahluka ngomodeli yefoni, inkampani, kanye nezwe. Ukumbozwa nesivinini kuyahlukahluka ngokwesifunda.
disclaimer.fairUse: Kuncike enqubweni yokusetshenziswa okufanele nemikhawulo yendawo

compare.title: Qhathanisa amaphakethe edatha e-eSIM
compare.disclaimer: Ukusetshenziswa kwedatha kwangempela kuncike ukuthi usebenzisa kanjani i-Chatforia (izwi, ividiyo, imidiya, nezinye izinhlelo zefoni yakho).

hero.subcopy: Instant eSIM data for travel, backup connectivity, and staying reachable away from Wi‑Fi.

mobile.choosePackSubtitle: Pick the coverage zone and amount of data that fits your trip or everyday backup needs.

feature.2: One-time data packs with clear pricing
feature.3: Use Chatforia when Wi‑Fi is unavailable

region.localSubtitle: Best for staying connected in one country.
region.europeSubtitle: Great for trips across supported European countries.
region.globalSubtitle: Best for international travel across multiple regions.

small.title: Iphakethe lokuqala
small.bestFor: Uhambo olufushane, ukuthumela imilayezo okulula, namakholi ngezikhathi ezithile

medium.title: Iphakethe labahambi
medium.bestFor: Amasonto amafushane, amakholi e-VoIP avamile, namamephu

large.title: Iphakethe lamandla
large.bestFor: Ukuxoxa okusindayo, amakholi, ividiyo, nokusetshenziswa kwe-hotspot

xl.title: XL pack
xl.bestFor: Best for extended travel and frequent video or media use.

family.title: i-Chatforia Family (idatha eyabelwe)
family.subtitle: Yabelana ngephuli yedatha eyodwa emndenini wakho. Ikhadi elilodwa, ama-akhawunti amaningi e-Chatforia, ukumbozwa komhlaba wonke.

small.title: Umndeni omncane
small.desc: Kuhlanganisa i-20 GB yedatha esheshayo eyabelwe — kuhle ngokusebenzisa okulula ababili noma abathathu.

medium.title: Umndeni omaphakathi
medium.desc: Kuhlanganisa i-40 GB yedatha esheshayo eyabelwe — kuhle ngamalungu asebenzayo amathathu kuya kwemihlanu.

large.title: Umndeni omkhulu
large.desc: Kuhlanganisa i-80 GB yedatha esheshayo eyabelwe — yemindeni enamandla ehlale ixhumene.

feature.members: Mema kuze kube amalungu engeziwe ayi-4
feature.membersMore: Kuhle ngamalungu asebenzayo amathathu kuya kwemihlanu
feature.fairUse: Kuncike enqubweni yokusetshenziswa okufanele nemikhawulo yendawo

family.disclaimer: Amaphakethe omndeni akha noma agcwalisa iphuli yedatha eyabelwe. Ungamema futhi ususe amalungu noma nini.
family.footnote: Amaphakethe omndeni abelana ngephuli yedatha eyodwa phakathi kwama-akhawunti e-Chatforia axhunyiwe. Ukutholakala nemikhawulo kuncike ezweni lakho nemithetho yendawo.

why.title: Kungani abantu beshintshela ku-Chatforia
why.subtitle: I-Chatforia ikunika inombolo yefoni yangempela, ukuhumusha okukhaliphile, kanye nendlela ecacile yokuya ngaphandle kwezikhangiso lapho usulungile.

textnow.title: i-Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Izikhangiso ezilula ku-Free, ukuthuthukiswa okulula kwe-Plus lapho usulungile, namathuluzi we-Premium i-TextNow engawanikeli.

voice.title: i-Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Uhlelo lwesimanje, idizayini yomhlaba wonke kuqala, nokuhumusha okwakhelwe ngaphakathi esikhundleni sokudlulisa amakholi endala.

messengers.title: i-Chatforia vs izinhlelo zokuxoxa
messengers.body: Bhala izinombolo zefoni zangempela — hhayi nje abanye abasebenzisi bohlelo — nge-AI nesimo esakhelwe ngaphakathi. Kuhle uma uvela ezinhlelweni ezifana ne-TextFree noma i-TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Ukuqhathanisa kususelwe olwazini olutholakala esidlangalaleni futhi lungase lushintshe ngokuhamba kwesikhathi. Ezinye izinhlelo zokubhala umlayezo zamahhala ezifana ne-TextFree noma i-TextMe zivame ukufana ne-TextNow.

faq.title: Imibuzo evame ukubuzwa mayelana namanani namaplan

free.a: Yebo. Iplan yamahhala ihlanganisa inombolo ye-Chatforia, ukushayela nokuthumela imilayezo nezikhangelezo. Ungahlala ku-Free isikhathi eside noma uthuthukise ukuze ususe izikhangelezo uvule izici ezengeziwe.

plusPremium.a: I-Plus isusa izikhangelezo futhi yandisa umlando wemilayezo yakho — kuhle ngokusetshenziswa kwansuku zonke. I-Premium yengeza ukuzenzakalisa okwengeziwe, amathuluzi e-AI ukuze uthathe kabusha nezimpendulo, nokusekelwa okuphambili kubasebenzisi abasindayo.

esim.a: I-Chatforia Mobile isebenzisa ukumbozwa kwe-eSIM yomhlaba wonke. Ukutholakala kuncike ezweni lakho kanye nemishini. Uzobona izinketho ezisekelwayo ngesikhathi sokuvula ngaphakathi kohlelo.

cancel.q: Ngingakhansela noma ngishintshe amaplan noma nini?
cancel.a: Yebo. Ungaphatha noma ukhansela ukubhalisa kwakho ekhasini lokukhokha ohlelweni. Izinguquko ziba nomthelela ekupheleni kwesikhathi sakho sokukhokha samanje.

family.a: Amaphakethe omndeni akha iphuli yedatha eyabelwe phakathi kwama-akhawunti amaningi e-Chatforia. Umuntu oyedwa ukhokha ikhadi, futhi ungamema noma ususe amalungu futhi usethe imikhawulo ngomuntu ngamunye.

randomChat.title: Random Chat
randomChat.subtitle: Meet someone new instantly, or choose to chat with Ria.
randomChat.description: Chat anonymously first. Add Friend later if it feels right.
randomChat.setAge: Set your age range in Profile → Age & Random Chat to be matched with people.
randomChat.waitingAddFriend: Waiting for them to accept Add Friend…
randomChat.hiddenUsernames: Usernames stay hidden until both people choose Add Friend.
randomChat.riaSeparate: Chat with Ria anytime — separate from random human matching.
randomChat.saveGuard: Only human-to-human chats can be saved
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: We only store an age range (not your exact date of birth). This is used to keep Random Chat pairings reasonable. To match with people (not just RiaBot), set your age band in Settings → Age & Random Chat.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Set your age range in Profile → Age & Random Chat to be matched with people.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: To match with people (not just RiaBot), set your age band in Settings → Age & Random Chat.

account.q: Ngikwazi kanjani ukudala noma ukubuyisela i-akhawunti yami?
account.a: Landa uhlelo noma usebenzise iwebhu, thepha “Yakha i-akhawunti”, qinisekisa i-imeyili/ifoni yakho. Ukuze ubuyisele, sebenzisa “Ukhohlwe iphasiwedi”.

privacy.q: Ingabe imilayezo ifihliwe ngemakhodi kusukela ekupheleni kuya ekupheleni?
privacy.a: Yebo. Imilayezo namakholi afihliwe ngemakhodi kusukela ekupheleni kuya ekupheleni ngokuzenzakalelayo. Wena kuphela nomamukeli ningafunda.

translate.a: Vumela “Hhumusha ngokuzenzakalelayo” ku-Settings → Ukubukeka & Ulimi. Sihumusha emshinini lapho kusekelwe khona, noma ngezinhlelo zokusebenza eziphephile ezine-metadata encane.

contact.a: Sifinyelela kithi ku-support@chatforia.com. Faka izithombe-skrini nenguqulo yohlelo lwakho.

section3.item2Part1: Once you’re signed in, you can link additional devices and set up encrypted backups from Settings in the app.

chatSafely.title: How to Chat Safely Online
chatSafely.intro: Online communication has made it easier than ever to connect with people across the world. Whether you're messaging friends, meeting new people, or collaborating professionally, messaging platforms play a major role in everyday life. However, staying safe online is just as important as staying connected.

personalInfo.title: Protect Your Personal Information
personalInfo.body: One of the most important rules of online safety is to avoid sharing sensitive personal information. This includes your home address, financial details, passwords, or any identifying information that could be misused. Even in casual conversations, it's best to be mindful of what you share and who you share it with.

safetyFeatures.title: Use Built-In Safety Features
safetyFeatures.body: Modern messaging platforms like Chatforia provide tools to help users stay safe. Features such as blocking, reporting, and privacy controls are designed to give users control over their experience. If someone behaves inappropriately or makes you uncomfortable, you should use these tools immediately.

scams.title: Be Aware of Scams
scams.body: Scammers often use messaging platforms to trick users into sharing personal information or sending money. Be cautious of messages that seem too good to be true, such as unexpected offers, urgent requests, or unfamiliar links. Always verify the identity of the person you're communicating with before taking any action.

responsibly.title: Communicate Responsibly
responsibly.body: Respectful communication helps create a safer environment for everyone. Avoid engaging in harmful or abusive conversations, and be mindful of how your words may affect others. Positive interactions contribute to a better experience for all users.

whySafety.title: Why Online Safety Matters
whySafety.body: As digital communication continues to grow, maintaining safety and trust becomes increasingly important. By following basic safety practices and using available tools, users can enjoy the benefits of messaging while minimizing risks.

chatSafely.conclusion: Staying safe online doesn’t require advanced technical knowledge—just awareness, caution, and good judgment. With the right habits, you can communicate confidently and securely.

about.title: Mayelana ne-Chatforia
about.description: I-Chatforia iyisithunywa esikhuluphekile, esinezilimi eziningi esinokufihla ngemakhodi kusukela ekupheleni kuya ekupheleni, ukuhumusha masinyane, nokushayela izwi/ividiyo. Umgomo wethu ulula: siza abantu baxhumane—ngokuphepha, ngokuyimfihlo, nangaphesheya kwezilimi.

values.privacy: Kubekwa phambili ukuphepha: Ukufihla ngemakhodi kusukela ekupheleni kuya ekupheleni ngokuzenzakalelayo.
values.access: Ukufinyelela kubo bonke: Kuhumusha ngokuzenzakalelayo i-100+ tilimi.
values.privacy_aria: Kubekwa phambili ukuphepha: Ukufihla ngemakhodi kusukela ekupheleni kuya ekupheleni ngokuzenzakalelayo.
values.access_aria: Ukufinyelela kubo bonke: Kuhumusha ngokuzenzakalelayo i-100+ tilimi.
values.control_aria: Ukulawula: Imilayezo lephumayo nemarkho kufundwa ngokuzithandela.

about.howDescription: Imilayezo ifihlwa emshinini wakho ngaphambi kokuba iphume. Ukuhumusha, amakhophi, nokuhambisana kwemishini kuhlelelwe ukunciphisa lokho amaseva ethu angakubona.
about.privacyDesc: End-to-end encryption and privacy controls are built into Chatforia from the start.
about.accessDesc: Chatforia helps people connect across languages, devices, and borders.
about.controlDesc: Choose how messages appear, when they disappear, and how your account stays protected.

press.title: Abezindaba
press.boilerplateBody: I-Chatforia iyinhlelo yokuthumela imilayezo ebeka ukuphepha phambili eyenza ukuxoxa phakathi kwezilimi kube lula. Imilayezo ifihlwa ngemakhodi kusukela ekupheleni kuya ekupheleni ngokuzenzakalelayo, futhi ukuhumusha okwakhelwe ngaphakathi kusekela i-100+ tilimi ngesikhathi sangempela. Abasebenzisi bangavumela imilayezo lephumayo, bagcine imarkho kufundwa ngokuzithandela, futhi bahambisane phakathi kwemishini. Itholakala ku-iOS, Android, kanye newebhu.
press.scanTip: Usekhompyutha? Skhena ngefoni yakho ukuze uthole uhlelo.

careers.title: Imisebenzi
careers.intro: Siyithimba elincane eliyisisekelo elakha i-Chatforia — isithunywa somhlaba wonke esiyimfihlo esethulwa kuwebhu, i-iOS, ne-Android. Uma unakekela ukuphepha, ukufihla ngemakhodi, nokuhlangenwe nakho kwabasebenzisi okujabulisayo, singathanda ukuzwa ngawe.
careers.openRoles: Imisebenzi eyisisekelo evuliwe: Umphathi wobunjiniyela be-Full-stack, Unjiniyela we-Backend (Node.js), Unjiniyela we-Frontend/Web (React), Unjiniyela we-Mobile (iOS), Unjiniyela we-Mobile (Android), DevOps/SRE, Unjiniyela Wokuphepha Nokufihla, Unjiniyela Wezobuchwepheshe (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Ungafaka kanjani isicelo: Sebenzisa inkinobho engezansi ukuthumela i-CV yakho nezixhumanisi.
careers.whyBullets:
• Siza ukwakha isisekelo sesithunywa esisha somhlaba wonke.
• Thumela ukuthuthukiswa okusetshenziswa kuwebhu, i-iOS, ne-Android.
• Sebenza ngqo nomsunguli mayelana nokwakhiwa komkhiqizo nokuqondisa umkhiqizo.
• Nikeza izindawo ezinomthelela omkhulu wesitaki: ukuthumela imilayezo, izwi, ividiyo, ukufihla, ubuchwepheshe bezobuchwepheshe, i-AI.
• Joyina ekuqaleni — ngaphambi kokuthi isibalo sabasebenzisi sikhule.

advertise.title: Khangisa ne-Chatforia
advertise.description: Finyelela abasebenzisi abaxoxayo abazimisele ngezindawo zokubeka ezihloniphekile neziphephile. Sinikeza izindawo zezibanner ezindaweni ezibonakala kakhulu, ukuxhaswa, kanye nokuthuthukiswa kwendlu. Ababhalisi be-premium ababoni izikhangelezo.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Siphinde sinikeze izindawo nge-Google AdSense. Ungakhomba i-Chatforia nge-publisher ID {{pubId}}, noma usebenzise ifomu engezansi ukuze uthole ukuxhaswa okuqondile.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Siphinde sinikeze ezinye izindawo nge-Google AdSense. Ukuxhaswa okuqondile kutholakala—sebenzisa ifomu engezansi.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Sisasebenzela izindawo zethu zezikhangiso. Sicela usitshele ngomkhankaso wakho futhi sizokuncoma izindawo.

why.highSession: Ukusebenza kwe-session okuphezulu kanye nesikhathi sokuhlala ku-UI yengxoxo
why.brandSafe: Izindlela eziphephile zomkhiqizo; ukuphela kwesikhathi esihloniphekile
why.deals: Izivumelwano eziqondile noma i-programmatic nge-AdSense/Google Ads

form.submittedMsg: Ngiyabonga! Isicelo sakho sisendleleni. Sizoxhumana maduzane.
form.mailtoInfo: Ivula iklayenti lakho le-imeyili ukuthumela isicelo…

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.successMsg: Thanks—our team will reply by email.
contact.errorSend: Could not send. Please email support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: This Privacy Policy explains how Chatforia (“we”, “us”) collects, uses, and shares information when you use our apps and services. We design Chatforia to minimize the data we can access.

infoWeCollect.title: Information we collect
infoWeCollect.account: Account info (e.g., email/phone) to create and secure your account.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Encrypted content (messages/calls) is end-to-end encrypted; we can’t read it.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage like crash logs, device type, or coarse analytics to improve performance.

sms.title: Mobile phone numbers and SMS
sms.body: If you choose to provide a mobile phone number, we use it to enable features such as account verification, login alerts, and user-to-user messaging via SMS where supported. We may send transactional SMS messages related to your account and activity on Chatforia. You can opt out of receiving SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (such as “STOP”) or by changing your notification preferences in the app. We do not sell your phone number or use it for unrelated marketing.
sms.addRecipient: Add a recipient above to start…

howWeUse.title: How we use information
howWeUse.provide: Provide and secure the service (auth, spam/abuse detection).

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: We don’t sell personal data. We may share limited data with processors (e.g., push notifications, analytics) under strict contracts.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Depending on your region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), you may request access, correction, deletion, or opt-out of certain processing. Contact: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Data retention & security
retention.body: We retain only what’s needed to operate the service and apply industry-standard security. E2E content can’t be decrypted by us.

children.title: Children
children.body: Chatforia isn’t directed to children under 13 (or as required by your local law).

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We’ll post updates here and revise the “Last updated” date.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: By using Chatforia you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, don’t use the service.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Provide accurate info and keep credentials secure.
accounts.itemResponsibility: You’re responsible for activity on your account.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: No illegal, abusive, or infringing content; no spam or automated abuse.

sms.title: SMS communications
sms.body: If you provide a mobile phone number, you agree that Chatforia may send you SMS messages related to your account and use of the service, such as login alerts, security notifications, and messages related to conversations you initiate or participate in. We do not use SMS for promotional or marketing messages without your explicit consent. Standard message and data rates may apply. You can opt out of SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (for example, “STOP”) or by updating your notification settings in the app.

yourContent.title: Your content
yourContent.body: You retain rights to your content. You grant us necessary rights to operate the service (e.g., routing, storage, translation).

disclaimer.title: Disclaimers & liability
disclaimer.body: Service is provided “as is” without warranties. To the fullest extent permitted by law, Chatforia isn’t liable for indirect or consequential damages.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We may update these terms; continued use after changes means acceptance.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

refund.title: Inqubomgomo Yekubuyiselwa Kwemali
refund.intro: Ku-Chatforia, sizama kuniketa umsebenti losezingeni lelisetulu kubo bonkhe basebenti. Lenkhombandlela ichaza kutsi nini kungabuyiselwa imali.

subscriptions.title: Kubhalisela (Subscriptions)
subscriptions.body: Kubhalisela kukhokhelwa kusengaphambili futsi kuphindzaphindvwa. Ungayekela noma nini ngekusebentisa ema-settings e-akhawunti yakho noma ipulatifomu losebentise kuyo kuthenga.

eligibility.title: Kufaneleka Kwekubuyiselwa Kwemali
eligibility.body: Imali ingabuyiselwa uma kube nekuphindvwa kukhokha, liphutsa ekukhokheni, noma tinkinga tekuchumana letivimba kusebentisa tintfo letikhokhelwako. Tincelo tibukwa ngesinye ngesinye.

nonRefundable.title: Lokungabuyiselwa
nonRefundable.body: Ngokuvamile, asibuyiseli imali yesikhatsi lesingakasetjentiswa, tincenye tekubhalisela, noma uma ungakayekeli ngaphambi kwekubuyeketa.

thirdParty.title: Kuthenga Ngemacembu Eselangeni
thirdParty.body: Uma kuthengiwe ngepulatifomu lesitsatfu njenge Apple App Store, kufanele ucele kubuyiselwa kulabo bapulatifomu ngco.

contact.title: Xhumana Natsi
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
doNotSell.body: Chatforia does not sell personal information. California residents can still submit requests under CPRA using the button below.

cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.body: Chatforia uses minimal cookies (e.g., session, security). We don’t use third-party ads cookies. Manage cookies via your browser’s settings.

whatWeSend.title: What we send
whatWeSend.body: Chatforia sends only account-related and conversational SMS to phone numbers a user has explicitly provided and consented to. Typical messages include login/verification codes, message delivery alerts, security notices, and transactional account updates.

optIn.title: How users opt in
optIn.body: Users opt in by entering their phone number during registration and checking the SMS consent checkbox on the registration page or the dedicated

optOut.title: How users opt out
optOut.stop: Reply STOP to any Chatforia SMS to opt out.

help.title: Help
help.bodyPrefix: Reply HELP for assistance or email
